description: Reserved central ECOG eligibility/context model. It is intentionally not inherited, rendered, or required in v0.31.0.

design_intent.baseline: Allow protocol-specific ECOG eligibility capture when implemented.
design_intent.ongoing: Optional context; deterioration may trigger clinician review rather than an automatic universal hold.
design_intent.partial_assessment: Never block single-value assessment solely because ECOG is absent.
